name: Quick and Easy Hazelnut Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Cream the butter until smooth.
Blend together the flour, confectioners sugar, toasted ground hazelnuts, and salt in a separate bowl.
Mix the two dry ingredient mixtures with the butter until combined.
Press the dough into an ungreased pan, covering it completely.
Pierce the surface of the dough several times with a fork to create a fine texture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
Allow the shortbread to cool in the pan for about 10 minutes before removing and drizzling with melted chocolate.
